mapper.select: select t1.equipment_nm , t2.std_eq_nm , esg.fn_getsystemcodeminornm('C0046',t3.inspection_cycle) as inspectionCycleNm from esg.tb_equipment_info t1 left join esg.tb_dataset_typeofequipment t2 on t1.std_eq_id = t2.std_eq_id left join esg.tb_safety_checklist t3 on t2.comp_id = t3.comp_id and t2.std_eq_id = t3.std_eq_id where t1.std_eq_id = #{stdEqId} and t1.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} order by t3.write_year desc limit 1

select t1.std_eq_id , t2.std_eq_id , t2.std_eq_nm , esg.fn_getsystemcodeminornm('C0046',t4.inspection_cycle) as inspectionCycleNm from esg.tb_safety_checklist t1 left join esg.tb_dataset_typeofequipment t2 on t1.comp_id = t2.comp_id and t1.std_eq_id = t2.std_eq_id and t2.use_yn = 'Y' left join ( select write_year, comp_id, std_eq_id, max(hist_seq) as hist_seq from esg.tb_safety_checklist_history group by write_year, comp_id, std_eq_id ) t3 on t1.std_eq_id = t3.std_eq_id and t1.comp_id = t3.comp_id and t1.write_year = t3.write_year left join esg.tb_safety_checklist_history t4 on t3.hist_seq = t4.hist_seq where t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y' order by t2.ord_seq asc

WITH inspection_data AS ( SELECT tsild.*, 0 as item_ord_seq FROM esg.tb_safety_inspection_log tsil LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_inspection_log_detail tsild ON tsil.write_year = tsild.write_year AND tsil.doc_no = tsild.doc_no AND tsil.doc_type = tsild.doc_type WHERE 1 = 1 AND tsil.std_eq_id = #{stdEqId} AND tsil.equipment_id= #{equipmentId} AND tsil.check_dt = #{checkDt} ), inspection_log_flag AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM inspection_data LIMIT 1 ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS log_exists ), detailed_inspection AS ( SELECT * FROM inspection_data ), checklist_item AS ( SELECT NULL as write_year, NULL as doc_no, NULL as doc_type, NULL as doc_seq, tscd.ord_seq, tsci.check_item, tscd.check_list, 'N' as acceptable_yn, 'N' as non_compliant_yn, NULL::timestamp as created_at, NULL as created_by, NULL::timestamp as updated_at, NULL as updated_by, NULL as check_dt, tsci.ord_seq as item_ord_seq FROM esg.tb_safety_checklist tsc LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_checklist_detail tscd ON tscd.write_year = tsc.write_year AND tscd.doc_no = tsc.doc_no AND tscd.doc_type = tsc.doc_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_checklist_item tsci ON tsci.doc_seq = tscd.check_item_seq AND tsci.write_year = tsc.write_year AND tsci.doc_no = tsc.doc_no AND tsci.doc_type = tsc.doc_type WHERE tsc.std_eq_id = #{stdEqId} AND tsc.comp_id = #{compId} AND tscd.use_yn = 'Y' AND tsci.use_yn = 'Y' ) SELECT * FROM detailed_inspection WHERE (SELECT log_exists FROM inspection_log_flag) = 1 AND check_dt = #{checkDt} UNION ALL SELECT * FROM checklist_item WHERE (SELECT log_exists FROM inspection_log_flag) = 0 order by item_ord_seq asc, ord_seq asc;
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_safety_inspection_log WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND check_dt = #{checkDt}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_inspection_log ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comp_id, std_eq_id, equipment_id, check_dt, check_start, check_end, setup_location, mf_spec, orgn_nm, non_compliance_action, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{compId}, #{stdEqId}, #{equipmentId}, #{checkDt}, #{checkStart}, #{checkEnd}, #{setupLocation}, #{mfSpec}, #{orgnNm}, #{nonComplianceAction}, 'Y', now(), #{createdBy} )

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_safety_inspection_log_detail WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND check_dt = #{checkDt}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_inspection_log_detail ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, ord_seq, check_item, check_list, acceptable_yn, non_compliant_yn, created_at, created_by, check_dt ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{ordSeq}, #{checkItem}, #{checkList}, #{acceptableYn}, #{nonCompliantYn}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{checkDt} )
